title: 15 PCS Premium Glow Sticks Party Packs for Children Adults Connectors Neon Colours Kit Bracelets, Rings Necklace Halloween Rave Fancy Dress Party Props Bag Fillers Toys Favours, Multicolour – 20cm
features: ✅ BRIGHT AS IT GETS: These glow sticks are ultra-bright and will light up your event like no other. Whether you’re celebrating a public holiday such as Halloween, New Year, Easter or 4th of July, or your own birthday celebration, pool party or wedding, our glow sticks get you covered. With a simple snap and shake you can light up your parties for a whole night. Connectors included for crafting bracelets, necklaces, and more, making them perfect for creating fun accessories at themed parties.

✅ No Leakage: These glow sticks for kids are made up of high- quality water-proof material that is non-toxic and non-flammable to ensure kids safety. Moreover, premium quality material guarantees no leakage. Perfectly engineered under strict quality control, these glow sticks are made from high quality materials to ensure up to glowing light so you could enjoy your party all night without worrying they would fade away.

✅ STRONG BUILD, REDUCED PLASTIC USAGE: We've made sure to use only top-notch materials, so your glow sticks connectors stay put. We’ve also managed to reduce the amount of plastic used for each glow sticks. Let your kids decorate parties using light sticks to make glowstick bracelet, eye glasses, necklaces, to wear or to have fun while making glow ball flower and more. Whether you are into bracelets and necklaces writing letters and numbers or creating party decorations our party kit has it all.

✅ THE PACKAGE INCLUDE: Customer will get 15 packs multicolour glow sticks. This pack was thoughtfully designed to provide the ultimate glow party experience. Our Glow Sticks Light Up Every Occasion From camping adventures and kids' bath time to stunning decor and electrifying concerts, our versatile glow sticks bring the perfect glow to all your favorite moments. Our multicolor glow sticks are the perfect companion for endless fun and enchantment.

✅ DIMENTION: Length 20cm x Dia 0.5cm. We've designed our glow sticks so that you can be relaxed knowing your kid is safe when playing with them. Their sturdy design makes them harder to snap so they don't easily break. Crafted with their safety in mind, watch their faces light up with joy as they enjoy glowing fun. Discover the perfect choice for kids and let the safe and vibrant glow create unforgettable memories!
description: ✔ BRIGHT GLOW STICKS: - Colourful and bright glowsticks that can be activated by gently bending each stick. Great for creating glowing bracelets, necklaces & more. They are very simple to use, gentle pressure with fingertips along the length of the stick, bend it slightly to fit into a connector and then a mild shake will light up the glow stick and bring it to its full color. Additional Round and Square connectors are used to create more shapes like dance ball, sunflower, triple bracelets etc. ✔ SPECIFICATIONS: - ★ Quantity : 15 Pieces ★ Colours : Multicolour ★ Materials : Polyethylene (PE) ★ SIZE : Length 20cm x Dia 0.5cm ✔ FEATURES: - ★ You can make bracelet, necklace or chain using it with glow sticks. ★ It is used to create sunflower, dancing balls and many other round shapes. ★ It is used to create triple glowstick bracelets. ★ Non-toxic, not radioactive, not flammable. ★ Let your imagination come up with some creative and fun uses for these glowsticks. ★ Glow sticks are great for parties, night corporate event or celebrations. ★ Safe and easy to use, simply snap and shake the glowstick to activate. ★ Waterproof and windproof and do not give off any heat. ✔ SATISFACTION GUARANTEED: - Your satisfaction is our first priority customer service always stands by for you to provide satisfactory service. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us, and we will give you a good answer within 24 hours.
